emails.subject: Updated Brokerage & Related Agreement List
emails.body: Updated Brokerage Related Agreement List Attached is the most recent update on the status of brokerage/related agreements you have requested. Most agreements have been fully executed including most recently, ITG-Europe Reminder: I will be out of the office tomorrow and Monday. If you have questions in my absence about any agreements on this list, please contact Stephanie Panus at 5-4239. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 <URL>

emails.subject: Re: Updated Brokerage & Related Agreement List
emails.body: Re: Updated Brokerage Related Agreement List Cheryl, Please refer to my e-mail titled "Re: Cantor Fitzgerald Co. executing broker agreement" sent on 10-May-01 and remove me from these distributions. Thanks and regards, John 10/05/2001 23:46 Cheryl Nelson@ENRON Cheryl Nelson@ENRON Cheryl Nelson@ENRON 10/05/2001 23:46 10/05/2001 23:46 Sent by: Cheryl Nelson@ENRON
